title: Uruguayan Stir Fry Noodles
description: A quick and easy stir-fry noodle recipe inspired by Uruguayan flavors. This dish combines crunchy vegetables with savory noodles.

ingredients.name: crunchy vegetables
ingredients.notes: such as bell peppers and carrots

instructions: Cook noodles according to package instructions.
Heat oil in a large skillet or wok over medium-high heat.
Add onion and cook until softened, about 3-4 minutes.
Add crunchy vegetables and cook until tender-crisp, about 4-5 minutes.
Stir in oregano and stir-fry sauce. Cook for 1 minute.
Combine cooked noodles with the vegetable mixture. Toss to coat.
Season with rice vinegar to taste.
